socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it. socketedItems.secDescrText: Wave your wand to create a hovering kinetic projectile. name: Warped Timepiece
flavourText: As you have lived, so you shall die
forever trying to keep up with me.
Your blood on these hands of mine
forever makes me the public enemy.
